name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.5.2: rels overlay merge — Reader-loaded NTPU thesis no-op save_document round-trip preserves theme/webSettings/people/customXml/commentsExtended/commentsIds rels (closes #35). v3.5.1: universal binary (x86_64+arm64). v3.5.0: true byte-preservation via dirty tracking. Closes #23 round-2 + #32 #33 #34 #35. Built on ooxml-swift 0.13.1.
